headline: Religious School Regulation Gaps Expose 320,000 Students to Risk
context: Unregistered and loosely regulated tahfiz and religious schools operate outside MOE oversight affecting hundreds of thousands.

cards.big: 320,000 students attend religious schools with varying levels of government oversight
cards.sub: 2017 Darul Quran Ittifaqiyah fire killed 23 students in unregistered tahfiz school

cards.big: Only 58% of tahfiz schools are registered with state religious authorities as of 2025
cards.sub: Unregistered schools face no fire safety building code or teacher qualification checks

cards.big: JAKIM proposed National Tahfiz Education Policy in 2019 but implementation stalled
cards.sub: State versus federal jurisdiction over Islamic education complicates regulation

cards.big: Indonesia requires all pesantren to register and meet minimum safety standards since 2020
cards.sub: Mandatory registration improved safety compliance from 45% to 82% in 3 years

cards.big: Respecting religious education does not mean exempting it from basic child safety rules
Should all schools including religious institutions face mandatory safety registration
